creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi
Date: Fri Apr 29 04:55:01 UTC 2016
New revision: 414255
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/414255

Log:
  misc/bdelta: 0.1.0 -> 0.3.1 with patches

  - changed to github
  - many changes since first release
  - added FEFE patch, see https://ptrace.fefe.de/bdelta.diff
  - added LICENSE

  PR:		209063
  Approved by:	novel (maintainer)

Changes:
  head/misc/bdelta/Makefile
  head/misc/bdelta/distinfo
  head/misc/bdelta/files/
  head/misc/bdelta/files/patch-bdelta.cpp
  head/misc/bdelta/files/patch-bpatch.cpp
  head/misc/bdelta/files/patch-file.h
  head/misc/bdelta/files/patch-libbdelta.cpp
